query: VHS scanlines TV static analog distortion CRT screen
message: sub:analog_degradation/VHS_CRT — anti_aesthetic — scanlines, TV static, color bars, pixel grids, retro CRT

response.objective_caption: A macro photograph of densely packed, curved parallel grooves on a dark surface, with alternating bright ridges and black channels forming a rhythmic pattern that fills the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black and white macro photograph of dusty, debris-filled grooves on a dark surface, rendered with heavy film grain and rough texture that emphasizes material decay and the tactile imperfection of the neglected object.
